name: Lasagna Bolognese
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan, then blend in flour.
2. Gradually add milk and whipping cream, stirring until thickened and smooth.
3. Add salt and pepper to taste.
4. Cook lasagna noodles in boiling salted water according to package directions. Drain, rinse, and spread on a damp towel.
5. Spread a thin layer of meat sauce Bolognese in a 13x9 inch baking dish.
6. Top with a layer of half the lasagna noodles, half the meat sauce, half the white sauce (cream), and half the cheese.
7. Repeat layers.
8. Bake uncovered at 375 degrees for 35-40 minutes, or until bubbly and golden brown on top.
9. Let stand for 10 minutes before cutting into squares and serving.
8 servings FROM: JEAN ALLEN (GRDG72B)
